name: Nightfall AI API
what_it_does: Cloud DLP platform that uses ML to detect sensitive data (PII, PHI, PCI, credentials, and secrets) in text, files, and API payloads in real time.
use_cases: Scan LLM outputs before persisting or sending them to prevent accidental PII leakage
Validate file uploads for sensitive data prior to storage
Monitor webhook payloads for credentials and secrets
Enforce data handling compliance in SaaS pipelines
Redact or alert on sensitive content in real-time agent workflows
not_for: Full SIEM or log management — Nightfall is a DLP scanner, not a threat detection platform
On-premises-only deployments requiring no cloud egress of scanned data
best_when: Best when agents need to sanitize or gate output before it is stored, sent, or displayed — especially in pipelines handling user-supplied or LLM-generated content.
avoid_when: Avoid when data cannot leave the environment for cloud scanning, or when you need broad security monitoring beyond sensitive data detection.

auth.notes: Single API key per workspace; key passed as Bearer token in Authorization header. Key rotation available via dashboard.

pricing.paid_tiers: Paid plans start at ~$75/month; enterprise pricing available for high-volume scanning
pricing.notes: Free tier sufficient for low-volume agent testing. Production workloads should budget for paid tiers based on scan volume.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits vary by plan; free tier is throttled significantly; paid plans offer higher throughput

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors return structured JSON with detector-level findings; false positive rates are documented per detector type.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Scan requests are stateless and idempotent; same payload always produces same detection result.
known_agent_gotchas: Binary file scans require base64 encoding of content before submission
Detection confidence thresholds need tuning per use case to balance precision and recall
Async scanning via webhooks adds latency — use sync API for inline agent gating

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 and HIPAA certified. Scanned data is not retained by default. Single API key model lacks granular scope control.
